title: JustEnhancement
description: A Client-Side Modpack offering great little improvements to everything!
body:
# JustEnhancement: The Enhanced Minecraft Experience  

Welcome to **JustEnhancement**! This client-side modpack combines the classic elements of Minecraft with smart enhancements to elevate your gameplay to a new level. It's perfect for players who love the original game but are looking for additional features and optimizations!  

## Key Features  

- **Controller Support:** Play comfortably with your preferred controller and enjoy an intuitive control experience perfectly tuned to the game mechanics.  
- **Graphics Optimizations:** Experience improved visual presentation that makes the Minecraft world more vibrant and engaging while retaining the classic look of the game.  
- **Enhanced User Interface:** Utilize a customizable and user-friendly interface that helps you manage your resources and inventory more efficiently.  
- **Gameplay Improvements:** Benefit from a variety of quality-of-life features that make survival and exploration easier, including improved navigation, crafting options, and much more.  
- **Vanilla Compatibility:** Play in the familiar environment of Vanilla Minecraft and discover the additional possibilities that *JustEnhancement* offers.  

With **JustEnhancement**, you get the best of both worlds: the classic Minecraft experience and exciting new features that enrich your gameplay. Let the adventure begin and explore the endless possibilities of *JustEnhancement*!  
### Make sure to use the Resourcepacks!!!
The Xali's Resourcepacks are not working so far, because CIT Resewn isn't updated yet!
